productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Brown Sandals
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The velvetty straps and midfoot zipper closure make this sandal a perfect buy. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic straps with a velvet outer Leather heel cup with a suede inner lining Leather midfoot strap with a zipper closure Leather footbed with a synthetic leather patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
